nasb.text: There was much grumbling among the crowds concerning Him; some were saying, “He is a good man”; others were saying, “No, on the contrary, He leads the people astray.”

esv.text: And there was much muttering about him among the people. While some said, “He is a good man,” others said, “No, he is leading the people astray.”

cnv.text: 群眾因他紛紛議論，有的說：“他是好人。”有的說：“不，他是欺騙眾人的。”

ccb.text: 众人对祂议论纷纷，有些人说：“祂是好人，”有些说：“不，祂欺骗民众。”

csbs.text: 人群中有许多人对他议论纷纷；有的说：“他是好人。”也有的说：“不，他是迷惑民众的。”
